visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: Function Pointers?
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Actually, let's keep it simple: refactor to use a pre-calculated factorial array for digits 0-9 to improve performance.
visualizerParams.initialCode: #include <stdio.h>\nint f(int n) { int r=1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) r*=i; return r; }\nbool isS(int n) { int s=0, t=n; while(t>0){ s+=f(t%10); t/=10;} return s==n; }

solution.explanation: Since we only care about factorials of digits (0-9), using a pre-calculated lookup table is much more efficient than recalculating the factorial every time.
